name: wokelo-openapi
description: OpenAPI specification for the Wokelo API suite

scripts.build-docs: mkdir -p dist && cp redoc.html dist/index.html && cp favicon.ico dist/favicon.ico
scripts.build-playground: mkdir -p dist && cp swagger.html dist/swagger.html && cp favicon.ico dist/favicon.ico
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run bundle && npm run build-docs && npm run build-playground

author: Wokelo
